question: Across all dates shown, approximately what proportion of total revenue comes from Lunch services?

options.A: About one quarter of the total revenue
options.B: About half of the total revenue
options.C: About three quarters of the total revenue
options.D: Lunch contributes only a very small share of the total revenue

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1200 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Lunch look as large as (or larger than) Dinner even though the totals favor Dinner.
